name: Chicken Sate
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boned and skinned chicken breasts (trimmed of fat)
recipeInstructions:
To make peanut sauce:
1. Combine ginger, chilies, garlic, green onions in a mixing bowl.
2. Whisk in peanut butter, coconut milk, lime juice, fish sauce or soy sauce, and granulated sugar (or taste).
3. Adjust seasoning so the sauce is balanced between sweet and salty.
4. Sprinkle with cilantro. Makes about 1 cup.
To make Chicken Sate:
1. In a bowl, combine turmeric, salt, and coconut milk. Add chicken strips and toss to coat. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.
2. While the chicken is marinating, soak bamboo skewers in cold water.
3. Drain the chicken and thread the strips onto the skewers.
4. Cook on a grill over hot coals or under broiler until cooked through, about 1-2 minutes per side.
